meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Project Template for AI Builders
content.seo_description: Overcome basic app limitations with the Antigravity project template. A high-impact guide for students using Antigravity and Claude Code to scale projects.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template provides the modular architecture necessary to move beyond static tutorials. By integrating Claude Code, you automate boilerplate and enforce clean design patterns. This approach accelerates development cycles, allowing you to focus on high-value feature engineering rather than troubleshooting basic structural limitations during your build process.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks following tutorials, yet every app you build feels like a hollow shell of a real product. You are stuck in the 'tutorial purgatory'—where your code works, but you lack the architectural confidence to scale or ship a production-ready feature. It is a frustrating plateau, but it is not a lack of talent; it is a lack of a professional-grade framework.

Enter the Antigravity project template. This is not just boilerplate; it is a blueprint designed for rapid iteration and high-performance AI integration. By shifting your workflow to use this template alongside Claude Code, you transition from being a student who copies code to an engineer who architects solutions. It is time to stop building toys and start shipping real-world software.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root directory structure that enforces separation of concerns, ensuring your AI logic remains decoupled from the UI layer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize an Antigravity project structure with a focus on modular service layers, separating API handlers from business logic.

steps.title: Configure the Context Provider
steps.description: Define the global state management that allows your AI components to share context without prop-drilling, essential for complex feature sets.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust context provider implementation that manages authentication state and AI session history across the application.

steps.title: Implement the AI Service Layer
steps.description: Create a unified service layer to handle API interactions, ensuring your LLM calls are resilient, logged, and type-safe.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an AI service layer that handles stream processing and error handling for OpenAI and Anthropic API endpoints.

steps.title: Build Dynamic UI Components
steps.description: Use the template's component library to rapidly iterate on your frontend, ensuring responsiveness and accessibility from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard component that consumes the AI service layer and displays real-time streaming data.

steps.title: Automate Integration Testing
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to write comprehensive unit and integration tests, ensuring your app doesn't break as you scale.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate an automated test suite for the AI service layer ensuring successful mock response handling and edge case validation.

pro_tips: Always use Environment Variables for API keys; never hardcode secrets, even in development, to avoid accidental leaks.
Leverage Claude Code's 'review' flag on every pull request to catch architectural drift before it becomes technical debt.
Modularize your AI prompts into JSON files outside the main codebase to allow for rapid iteration without redeploying the app.
Implement a 'circuit breaker' pattern in your API calls to prevent your app from crashing if the AI provider experiences latency.
Document your API contracts using OpenAPI specs early to ensure your frontend and backend stay perfectly synchronized during development.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully built your first feature using this template, deploy it to a staging environment and begin stress-testing your API endpoints. Focus on gathering user feedback to iterate on your AI logic.
content.conversion_block: You have the blueprint, the tools, and the professional mindset to ship. Stop building for yourself and start building for the market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
